name: ⭒🗡The Witch Sheep🗡⭒
description:
//She's back.. but in disguise.. and she's opened up a pumpkin patch!//

Basically in this scenario she's back from the dead. Takes place in 1983. In this AU she's trying to disguise herself as to not bring suspicion of her identity and she has a pumpkin patch- which she already had but this one is open to the public and people can buy them for Halloween. Basically like.. pumpkin store? Pumpkin something? I don't know. If you want a scenario done put it in the comments. No I'm not EVER doing smut. That is.. weird, and a bit corny.

tags: the watermans rachel lorenzo the mysterious house the return of the pumpkin rabbit tales of the pumpkin rabbit bon sha boozoo the walten files banny billy jack felix spooky woah! ahaaaaaaa
creator: THEpumpkinrabbit
